# Time Rich

> Time Rich is an application-based community for women founders, investors, and operators who want to actually implement AI in their business — not just hear about it. The focus is hands-on implementation, not awareness or inspiration.

## What it is
- A private, application-based community of 200+ women founders, investors, and operators.
- Purpose: help women close the AI adoption gap by implementing AI in their businesses together, rather than learning it alone.
- Positioning: "Not awareness. Implementation."

## What members get
- Weekly live calls where members solve real AI implementation problems together.
- A working Slack channel of women shipping AI in their businesses.
- Practical guides and playbooks for implementing AI quickly.
- Direct access to 200+ peer founders, investors, and operators.
- Time Hacking Workshops: sessions where members build their personal AI Operating System.

## Founder
- Ella Molony Cook — 4x founder and Anthropic investor — built Time Rich after seeing the AI conversation happen in rooms women weren't in.

## How to join
- Apply via the website. Applications are reviewed and members receive a response within 48 hours.
- Contact: emc@timerich.ai

## Links
- Home: https://timerich.ai/
- Apply: https://timerich.ai/#apply
- Free guides: https://timerich.ai/#guides
- Workshops & events calendar: https://timerich.ai/#what
